secciones.contenido: DEEP TISSUE MASSAGE - Designed to release tight, fatigued muscles and joints, this specialized service involves deep-tissue techniques to ease and open taut muscle tissue and disperse toxins. 30 min $65, 50 min $109, 90 min $149. MOTHER-TO-BE MASSAGE - This massage is personalized to meet the unique needs of pregnancy by promoting circulation, relaxation and improve muscle and joint functions. 30 min $65, 50 min $109, 90 min $149. SPORT MASSAGE - Sport massage and stretching greatly improves muscle tone and flexibility while increasing circulation and stimulating the nervous system. This style can help old injuries and work out soreness from that last trip to the gym. 30 min $65, 50 min $109, 90 min $149. SWEDISH MASSAGE - This classic massage will soothe and relax the body and mind. Concentrating on relieving tension, toning muscles and reducing stress. 30 min $65, 50 min $109, 90 min $149. HOT STONES MASSAGE - This classic massage will soothe and relax the body and mind. Concentrating on relieving tension, toning muscles and reducing stress. 30 min $70, 50 min $119, 90 min $159. Head in heaven scalp massage with aroma oil - A relaxing and soothing treatment blending massage and pressure point therapy to loosen and revive muscles of the scalp and neck to stimulate circulation and relaxation. 15 min $30. Back polish with sugar scrub exfoliating your skin to remove dead skin cells, unclogging pores to prepare for a body treatment, promoting cell regeneration to encourage healthy skin, moisturizing and hydrating dry skin. 15 minutes $30. Massage enhancements: Add organic aromatherapy to your massage - $15.00. Add organic coconut not refined virgin oil to your massage - $5.00. Add chocolate back and shoulders mask to your massage - $15.00.

Hydro Facial - HydraFacial is a three-step process to deep-clean, exfoliate and hydrate the skin. Help with Clogged pores, Enlarged pores, Oily skin, Dehydration acne. HydraFacial uses a form of dermabrasion called hydradermabrasion to slough off dead skin cells and debris by propelling a liquid onto the surface. In addition, the HydraFacial uses a proprietary tip that creates a vortex effect for more effective exfoliation. The final stage of a HydraFacial is the infusion of vitamins and peptides. 60 min, $200. Express Facial - An ex-foliating cleansing followed by a resurfacing mask that leaves the skin feeling fresh and smooth. 15 min, $50. Glycolic Peel 33% (dead skin cells exfoliation). Always combine with hydration and nutrition facial. This ultra-resurfacing glycolic treatment exfoliates dead surface skin cells, leaving skin firmer, and healthier. $50. Brow tinting - Variety of colors. Natural looks. Color keeps up to 2-3 months. $30. Firming Tri-Peptide Serum Facial - A skin nourishing peptide serum with concentrated active ingredients. Helps reduce trans epidermal water loss and fight the signs of aging. 30 min, $75, 60 min, $139. Nourishing Facial - This intense treatment hydrates, smoothes skin tone, and increases elasticity. Erases the signs of fatigue to reveal a refreshed complexion and skin tone is balanced with a dramatic improvement in texture and clarity. An outstanding treatment with immediate results! 30 min, $75, 60 min, $139. Head in heaven scalp massage (dry hand) add to any facial - 15 min, $35, 30 min, $60. Eye lash tinting - For luxury deep black eye lashes. Color keeps up to 2-3 months. $30.

HOT TUB. Infrared sauna - Infrared sauna session with aromatherapy for one person 60 minutes $35. Infrared heat provides all the healthy benefits of natural sunlight without any of the dangerous effects of solar radiation. When far infrared waves are applied to water molecules (comprising 70% of our body) these molecules begin to vibrate. This vibration reduces the ion bonds and the eventual breakdown of the water molecules causes encapsulated gases and other toxic materials to be released. The far infrared rays consist of similar wavelengths as that which is emitted naturally by the human body. Salt room - A room with salt brick panels, also has salt vapor generators, which salt particles and enjoy the healing effects of salt on their skin. Benefits include: Abatement of bronchial inflammation, Removal of airborne pollen particles from airways, Strengthening of immune system, Cleansing and sanitation of the airways, Prevention and treatment of common cold and flu, Allergies, Asthma, Sinusitis, Sinus headaches.
